column1: 本業のかたわら、週末は絵を描いている。
column2: ほんぎょうのかたわら、しゅうまつはえをえがいている。
column3: Alongside my main job, I paint on weekends.
column4: かたわら (while, besides, in addition to — alongside a main occupation)
column5: Verb[dict] + かたわら / Noun + の + かたわら
column6: indicates doing a secondary activity alongside a primary one over time; often describes a side activity run parallel to one's main job or role
column7: かたわら: painting is ongoing secondary to main work
column8: かたわら = parallel ongoing secondary alongside main; ながら = while (simultaneous, same moment); がてら = main enables secondary; かつ = and also (formal addition)
